LanguageData.AE_TT_DefaultSortMode: Configures how the "Auto Tier Tag" reorders the colonist bar after applying tier prefix. None: only apply prefix, keep original order. By Tier+Value: S->A->B->C->D->X left to right, within tier by combat value desc (recommended). By Role+Tier: Brawler -> Shooter -> Doctor -> Worker -> Pacifist -> Hunter -> Leader, within role by tier desc. By Combat Value: pure combat value desc, ignoring tier (high-skill pacifists may take front spots).
LanguageData.AE_ReallocRules_CustomTier_Desc: Manually assign a tier for this colonist, bypassing auto formula. In DEBUG mode the label shows the code (e.g. S#John).
LanguageData.AE_Tier_SSS: SSS: TriggerHappy+Tough+Shooting Major / Tough+Melee Major+Nimble/Brawler / Industrious+Neurotic+3 work Majors
LanguageData.AE_Tier_SS: SS: TriggerHappy+Shooting Major / Tough+Melee Major / Industrious+Neurotic+2 work Majors
LanguageData.AE_Tier_S: S: TriggerHappy+Shooting Minor / Tough+Melee passion / Industrious+Neurotic+1 work Major / Special talent / Beauty+Social Major
LanguageData.AE_Tier_C: C: no passion but has trait
LanguageData.AE_GhoulHint: Ghouls cannot use gear. Tier shown for player reference only.
LanguageData.AE_TT_Role_Default: Default: no significant combat skill tendency
LanguageData.AE_TT_Role_Shooter: Shooter: Shooting>=8 and Shooting>Melee, prefers ranged weapons
LanguageData.AE_TT_Role_Brawler: Brawler: Melee>=8 or Brawler trait, prefers melee (Veto ranged)
LanguageData.AE_TT_Role_Doctor: Doctor: Medicine>=8 and is highest combat-related skill
LanguageData.AE_TT_Role_Worker: Worker: Shooting and Melee both <5, prefers work-stat apparel
LanguageData.AE_TT_Role_Leader: Ideo Leader: has ideology role (label only)
LanguageData.AE_TT_Context_Idle: Idle: ghoul does not participate in context detection
LanguageData.AE_TT_Context_Cold: Cold: ambient temp below comfort range for 2500 ticks
LanguageData.AE_TT_Context_Hot: Hot: ambient temp above comfort range for 2500 ticks
LanguageData.AE_TT_Tier: Tier S/A/B/C/D/X discretized from combat value, decides colonist bar sort priority
LanguageData.AE_TT_CombatValue: Combat Value = (Shooting*passion + Melee*passion) * skill weight + trait bonus
LanguageData.AE_TT_PawnValue: Pawn Value: comprehensive evaluation of skills, traits, health
LanguageData.AE_TT_ArmorPref_Heavy: Heavy[front]: prefers heavy armor to absorb frontline damage (display only, no auto-allocation)
LanguageData.AE_TT_ArmorPref_Flexible: Flex[back]: free choice by score (display only, no auto-allocation)
LanguageData.AE_TT_ArmorPref_Light: Light[worker]: prefers light armor for work efficiency (display only, no auto-allocation)
LanguageData.AE_TT_GlobalWorkReallocate: Reassign all colonists' work priorities via multi-pass coordinated allocation by work category. Emergency=1; key work (Doctor/Warden/Childcare) passionate top2=1 and guarantee >=2; Hunting max 2, back row first; Research guarantee 1; other skill work guarantee 2, sorted by passion->skill->work count; beyond guarantee passionate=4 backup, non-passionate=0 disabled; Hauling/Cleaning by tier=1/3/4.
LanguageData.AE_TT_AutoTierTag: When checked, auto-executes tier tagging: every 3000 ticks, and immediately on new colonist. Executes once immediately when checked; when unchecked, clears all tier tags and restores original names.
LanguageData.AE_TT_AutoWorkConfig: When checked, auto-executes work reallocation: every 3000 ticks, and immediately on new colonist. Executes once immediately when checked; when unchecked, only stops auto-execution, keeps current work assignment.
LanguageData.AE_TT_AutoMarkPawn: When checked, draws a vivid red star marker above non-colonist humans (enemies/visitors/traders/wild humans) of S+ tier (S/SS/SSS) in real time. Does not modify any object name, pure frontend drawing, safe and reversible; for quick identification of high-value targets to prioritize capture or vigilance. When checked, counts current targets and pops a message; when unchecked, the star disappears automatically.
LanguageData.AE_AutoMarkPawnResult: Found {0} high-value non-colonist targets (S+ tier), marked with red star
LanguageData.AE_TT_AutoFoodPolicy: When checked, auto-configures colonist food policies: triggers on colonist count change or ideo change (successful conversion), with 2500 tick cooldown. Rules: Cannibal trait or cannibalism precept -> AE_Cannibal (allows human meat); insect meat precept -> AE_Insect (allows insect meat); others -> AE_Normal. Executes once immediately when checked; when unchecked, only stops auto, keeps current policy.
LanguageData.AE_TT_AutoDrugPolicy: When checked, auto-configures colonist drug policies: triggers on colonist count change or ideo change (successful conversion), with 2500 tick cooldown. Rules: Teetotaler trait or drug-prohibited/abhorrent precept -> AE_NoDrugs; others -> AE_Normal (social drugs: beer + smokeleaf). Executes once immediately when checked; when unchecked, only stops auto, keeps current policy.
